content.en:
"Agreed?"

The Black Wind Mountain Lord was also shocked.

His demands were so excessive, and the value was higher than that of the entire Xuanxuan Forbidden Realm, even higher than one realm.

After all, the value of a Xuanxuan Forbidden Realm can't make a top domain ancestor break through to the level of a supreme domain ancestor.

Moreover, he also has an ancestral medicine, and the value of the ancestral medicine is comparable to a holy relic.

Coupled with the resources of the three Holy Body Inheritance, the Twenty Domain Techniques, and the 10 million Battle Realm Tower points, what an exaggerated request!

But I never expected that Ye Tian would agree!

What the Black Wind Mountain Lord didn't know was that Ye Tian's status was so high now, and the mere holy relics were nothing to him.

Moreover, after completely controlling the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, he could fuse the Creation Mixed Yuan Well with the Forbidden Void Realm to create a world with unlimited potential, so it was nothing to pay for this little thing.

With the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, he is sure that he will be able to build this realm into a place similar to the Dark Sanctuary in the future!

Besides, he is also a member of Black Wind Mountain, although he is only in name now, it is reasonable to give Black Wind Mountain some benefits, and he naturally does not care about these resources.

The Black Wind Mountain Lord asked for a lot of things, and Ye Tian would definitely not be able to take them out for a while.

He went to the Battle Realm Tower and exchanged the treasures he needed from the Battle Gate, and then returned to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

......

"Black Wind Mountain Lord, this is the Glazed Saint Source Fruit, which has unimaginable help for the top domain ancestor to impact the strongest domain ancestor. The reason why it is difficult for the top domain ancestor to be promoted to the strongest domain ancestor is because the top domain body wants to transform into the strongest domain ancestor, which is very difficult, and only the combination of the domain body and the holy body can increase the success rate of a great one, and the stronger the holy body, the greater the hope of breaking through. However, the Glazed Saint Source Fruit was able to forcibly push the top domain ancestor to break through to the supreme domain ancestor level. But it also has flaws, because once it is used, it will be more difficult to hit the level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor in the future, unless it is to find a treasure that can assist in breaking through the Invincible Domain Ancestor, otherwise if you rely on your own breakthrough, it will be more than ten times more difficult than other Supreme Domain Ancestors. "

Ye Tian took the glazed holy source fruit and introduced.

"Thank you, Alliance Leader!"

The Lord of Black Wind Mountain was so satisfied that he took over the Glazed Saint Source Fruit.

Compared to the effect of the glazed holy source fruit, that little flaw was nothing.

With his talent, his hopes of becoming the Strongest Domain Ancestor in the future are very slim.

If there is a glazed saint source fruit, he will almost become a supreme domain ancestor, as for the invincible domain ancestor, that realm is too far away from him.

If you can't even step into the Supreme Domain Ancestor, how can you step into the Invincible Domain Ancestor in the future?

Therefore, he naturally didn't care about the defects of the Glazed Saint Source Fruit.

He was very satisfied with this treasure.

Subsequently, Ye Tian handed over the three Holy Body Inheritances, the Twenty Domain Techniques, and many resources to the Black Wind Mountain Lord one by one.

Not long after, the domain ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain and the countless Dao Ancestors under their command moved out of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm one after another, and directly opened up a domain boundary somewhere in the Dao Mountain Realm as the headquarters of the Black Wind Mountain.

With the resources given by Ye Tian, Black Wind Mountain is afraid that it will be able to give birth to a large number of domain ancestors in the future.

Moreover, the Black Wind Mountain Lord was also able to be promoted to the top domain ancestor and the strongest domain ancestor in a short period of time, after all, he had an ancestral medicine, which was enough for him to be promoted to the extreme of the top domain ancestor in a short period of time, and then taking the glazed holy source fruit could make the top domain body transform into the supreme domain body, and thus be promoted to the supreme domain ancestor.

Maybe it won't be too long, and the Black Wind Mountain Lord will be able to become a supreme domain ancestor.

However, even if he became a Supreme Domain Ancestor, he was only a very ordinary Supreme Domain Ancestor, far from being Ye Tian's opponent.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

At this time, the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm has almost become the territory of the human race, and countless human races are scattered, because the territory is too large, many human races can be a fief alone or a continent or a small world.

This era belongs to the era of the human race, and the treatment of every human race is extremely good.

Coupled with countless resources, the geniuses of the human race emerge in an endless stream, and the domain ancestors of the human race are also born one by one.

---------------------

"It's time to fuse the Genesis Mixed Element Well!"

Ye Tian was not ready to wait.

Subsequently, he came to the Sea of Origin of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm and took out the Creation Mixed Yuan Well.

As long as the Creation Mixed Yuan Well is fused with the Origin Sea of the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, it can cause the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm to evolve and open up an incomparably powerful world.

Such a world is called the Sacred Realm in the Dark Sanctuary!

In the Dark Sacred Realm, only the Seventy-two Holy Lands and the Ten Holy Gates have the Holy Realm, strictly speaking, the world owned by the Holy Land is called the Holy Realm, while the Ten Holy Gates have the Ancestral Realm.

The Ancestral Realm is very difficult to create, and it takes endless resources to create it.

The Ancestral Realm of the Dark Destruction Domain is not as good as the Dark Sacred Domain, after all, the Dark Destruction Domain does not have many resources, for example, although the Dream Clan has an ancestor, it is difficult for them to create an Ancestral Realm.

Originally, it was impossible to give birth to the Holy Realm in the realm, and it was impossible to even build it, because the realm could not withstand the power of the Sacred Realm.

The Genesis Hybrid Well has the ability to open up and evolve worlds, and even open up a world that is above any other.

Since it is the creation of the world, it naturally has the ability to shelter a realm, and it will also evolve a realm to another level, which is a region with great influence.

Moreover, once the Creation Mixed Yuan Well and the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm merged and evolved, Ye Tian would also be equivalent to the master of the new world at that time.

When the time comes, he will be able to exert a very terrifying strength in the new world, and he will even be able to mobilize the power of the Creation Chaos Well to suppress the enemy.

The merging of the Creation Mixed Element Well with the world does not mean that it has disappeared.

Once a new world is born, it is the origin of the world.

Rumble!!!!!

Under Ye Tian's control, the Creation Mixed Yuan Well merged with the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, and the entire world began to shake.

Whoa!!!!

Outside the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, a Famous Domain Ancestor arrived here and sensed the changes in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

"What's going on?"

Many domain ancestors were stunned and didn't know what was going on.

"The Xuanxu Forbidden Realm seems to be evolving, but he is already in the Forbidden Realm, the limit of a realm world, how can he still evolve?"

"Could it have something to do with the alliance leader? Some time ago, the alliance leader made all the forces withdraw from the Xuanxu Taboo Realm, and even paid a great price, I'm afraid it has something to do with his plan, and now the changes in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm must have something to do with him?"

"Let's continue watching, it should be a good thing, the alliance leader will not be unfavorable to himself!"

A group of domain ancestors watched the changes in the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

I saw that the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm continued to expand, and the aura became more and more powerful, gradually surpassing the Forbidden Realm.

At the same time, the entire Daoshan realm was also affected.

Not to mention that the chaotic vitality is getting stronger and stronger, the entire realm is still expanding, constantly engulfing the areas of the dark forbidden domain.

This scene completely stunned all the domain ancestors.

This matter is too incredible for them, they have never heard of the realm can be expanded!
